author: Claude
message:
Add go-ssb-room Docker setup, debug harness, and GNUstep porting plan

- tmp-room/Dockerfile: Multi-stage production build of ssbc/go-ssb-room from source
- tmp-room/Dockerfile.dev: Dev build with healthcheck and debug tools
- docker-compose.yml: Add GNUstep build container (scuttle-build, debug profile)
- docker/Dockerfile.gnustep: Ubuntu 22.04 + GNUstep + OpenSSL + SQLite3 build env
- skills/ssb-room-debug/SKILL.md: Debug skill with test workflows and known failure modes
- skills/ssb-room-debug/references/ROOM_PROTOCOL.md: go-ssb-room protocol reference
- tools/debug/ssb-room-harness.sh: Integration test harness (identity, connect, peers, EBT)
- tools/debug/trace-handshake.sh: SHS handshake capture and decode tool
- plans/topics/gnustep-porting-hypotheses.md: 9 hypotheses for Linux port with test paths
- .gitignore: Fix tmp-room and deciduous ignore rules

https://claude.ai/code/session_01Syh7weDAkeew3aUDmej1kt

author: Jack Valinsky
message: UI Overhaul: Migrate to TEA-based components and cleanup
